description: Comprehensive project improvements for open-source readiness - remaining items after initial cleanup

userStories.title: Add frontend pre-commit hooks for ESLint and TypeScript
userStories.description: As a developer, I need automatic linting and type checking before commits so I don't break the build.
acceptanceCriteria: Add pre-commit hook that runs ESLint on staged .ts/.tsx files
Add pre-commit hook that runs tsc --noEmit on TypeScript files
Hooks use cached results for speed
Hooks don't block commits for warnings, only errors
Test: modifying a file with an ESLint error should fail pre-commit
userStories.notes: Backend already has ruff hooks. Add frontend hooks to .pre-commit-config.yaml

userStories.title: Add frontend unit tests for remaining components
userStories.description: As a developer, I need test coverage above 80% so I can refactor with confidence.
acceptanceCriteria: Add tests for MessageBubble component
Add tests for CitationCard component
Add tests for PDFViewer component
Add tests for CitationGraphView component
Run vitest run --coverage and verify >80% coverage
All tests pass on CI
userStories.notes: 76 tests passing. MessageBubble, CitationCard, PDFViewer, CitationGraphView, NodeDetailPanel, useTheme, useSidebar all tested.

userStories.title: Add Docker health check and multi-arch support
userStories.description: As a deployer, I need Docker health checks so I can monitor container health automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Add HEALTHCHECK to frontend/Dockerfile (curl localhost:80)
Add HEALTHCHECK to backend/Dockerfile (curl localhost:8000/health)
Update docker-compose.yml to use health checks
Add restart policies based on health check status
docker compose up --build succeeds and both services are healthy
userStories.notes: Backend already has /health endpoint. Frontend nginx needs health check endpoint.

userStories.title: Add error boundaries and loading states to frontend
userStories.description: As a user, I need graceful error handling so I never see a blank screen when something breaks.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ErrorBoundary component wrapping all page routes
Add loading skeletons for all data-fetching pages
Error boundary shows retry button and friendly message
Test: simulate network error and verify error boundary catches it
userStories.notes: Check if react-error-boundary package is already installed. If not, add it.

userStories.title: Add accessibility improvements (ARIA labels, keyboard navigation)
userStories.description: As a user relying on assistive technology, I need proper ARIA labels and keyboard shortcuts.
acceptanceCriteria: All interactive elements have aria-label or aria-labelledby
Keyboard navigation works for all major flows (tab, enter, escape)
Color contrast meets WCAG AA standards
Screen reader can navigate sidebar properly
userStories.notes: Use axe-core or eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y for automated checks

userStories.title: Add aria-labels to interactive elements lacking accessibility support
userStories.description: As a user relying on assistive technology, I need all interactive elements to have proper ARIA labels.
acceptanceCriteria: CitationCard action buttons (toggle, copy, link) have aria-labels
AddPaperDialog action buttons have aria-labels
MobileMenuSheet and MobileBottomNav have aria-labels
ToolModeSelector has aria-labels
PapersPage action buttons have aria-labels
All icon-only buttons have aria-label or aria-labelledby
userStories.notes: All icon-only buttons now have aria-labels. Most components already had them; added to MobileBottomNav More button, ProjectDetail back button, and PDFReaderLayout back button.

userStories.title: Split large page components into sub-components
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need large files split for easier navigation and code review.
acceptanceCriteria: PapersPage.tsx (627 lines) split into toolbar, table, bulk actions sub-components
WritingPage.tsx (560 lines) split into editor, sidebar, toolbar sub-components
AddPaperDialog.tsx (542 lines) split into upload form, search form, step components
SubscriptionManager.tsx (460 lines) split into list, form, dialog components
Each extracted component has focused responsibility (<400 lines)
userStories.notes: Focus on PapersPage.tsx and WritingPage.tsx first. Ensure existing tests still pass after refactoring.
